---
title: "Team"
---

## Yuyan Jiang

**Incoming Assistant Professor (Sep 2026)**
<br> Human Biology Division, Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center
<br> Radiation Oncology Division, Fred Hutchinson Cancer Center
<br> Department of Radiation Oncology, University of Washington School of Medicine 

Instructor, Stanford University School of Medicine 2026
<br> Postdoc, Stanford University School of Medicine, 2025
<br> PhD, Nanyang Technological University, Singapore, 2020
<br> BEng, Sun Yat-sen University, China, 2016

Phone: 650-283-8810
<br> Email: yyjiang@stanford.edu
<br> Website: [Stanford Profile](https://profiles.stanford.edu/yuyan-jiang),[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yuyan-jiang-64374a130/), [Lab website](https://sites.google.com/view/yjianglab), [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=egRePcQAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) 

## Could This Be You?
We’re hiring at all levels! 

This section will be updated soon.
